overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The journey begins under a covered urban walkway with vibrant neon signs, transitions to open streets with futuristic architecture and light traffic, and concludes along a waterfront promenade with views of the ocean and distant industrial structures.

events.description: camera pans left to focus on the GENJINHO neon sign while character continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through covered walkway beneath concrete overpass with yellow tactile paving

notable_agents.action: standing stationary near the GENJINHO neon sign entrance

large rectangular pillars supporting the overpass structure
textured yellow guidance strips embedded in the sidewalk
bright yellow neon sign with arrow pointing to establishment entrance
large vertical digital display showing red and white advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character walking through a covered urban walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment features yellow tactile paving strips and is illuminated by artificial neon lighting. At approximately 7 seconds, the camera pans left to reveal a bright yellow GENJINHO neon sign, with an NPC standing nearby. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with wet reflective surfaces and mixed lighting from digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with commercial buildings and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with visible dusk sky and illuminated building facades
futuristic vehicles with headlights on pass by on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: character walking along city sidewalk with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall glass and steel towers with spires visible against the dusk sky
modern building facade with horizontal yellow neon strip lighting
tall modern street lamps with white illumination
futuristic cars driving on the wet asphalt road with reflections

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open city street at dusk. The scene reveals futuristic skyscrapers in the distance and modern buildings with distinctive yellow neon lighting. Vehicles pass by on the wet road to the right, their headlights reflecting off the damp pavement. The camera follows the character as they walk along the sidewalk toward the towering city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with ocean view and distant industrial structures

events.description: street opens up to waterfront promenade with ocean becoming visible on the left side
reaches waterfront railing with clear view of dark ocean water and distant industrial plant

agents.ego_description: character walking along waterfront promenade with ocean on the left and city skyline receding to the right

entered.detail: dark water surface extending to the horizon under the dusk sky
metal safety barrier separating the walkway from the water
metal and wood benches positioned facing the water
large industrial structure with smokestacks visible across the water
modern curved light fixture illuminating the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a wide-open waterfront promenade as the ocean comes into view on the left. The character walks past benches and modern street lamps along the railing, with the dark water stretching out to the horizon. In the distance across the water, a large industrial plant with smokestacks is visible against the blue hour sky. The futuristic city skyscrapers remain visible but now recede to the right as the path follows the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban underpass to an expansive waterfront promenade at dusk. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where the character walks along yellow tactile paving, with the camera panning left to reveal a bright yellow GENJINHO neon sign amidst wet, reflective surfaces. As the character emerges from the covered walkway, the environment opens into a wide city street where futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance and vehicle headlights glint off the damp pavement. The scene then shifts toward the coast, expanding into a wide-open promenade as the ocean appears on the left and the city skyline recedes to the right. Finally, the camera follows the character past modern street lamps and benches toward a distant industrial plant with smokestacks silhouetted against the deep blue hour sky.
